requirement_topic.en: Battery Safety — IEC 62619 Conformity via LSI (Lesotho Standards Institution) as the Required Technical Baseline
requirement_topic.zh: 电池安全——通过LSI（莱索托标准机构）进行IEC 62619合格评定作为所需技术基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電池安全——通過LSI（賴索托標準機構）進行IEC 62619合格評定作為所需技術基準

summary.en: LSI (Lesotho Standards Institution) is the national standards body of Lesotho, established under the Lesotho Standards, Quality Assurance, Accreditation and Metrology Act. LSI is responsible for the development and promotion of standards and conformity assessment in Lesotho. For lithium-ion BESS, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for cells and modules in stationary energy storage applications. LSI conformity — whether through mandatory certification or project-level conformity documentation — to IEC 62619 is the expected technical baseline for BESS battery safety in Lesotho. IEC 62933-5-1 (Safety considerations for electrical energy storage systems) addresses system-level safety requirements. IEC 63056 (Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems) provides additional cell-level safety criteria for stationary BESS applications. A specific mandatory certification scheme for BESS cells and modules administered by LSI had not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; exporters should verify the current LSI regulated-product scope and any applicable mandatory conformity mark requirements directly with LSI before shipment.
summary.zh: LSI（莱索托标准机构）是莱索托的国家标准机构，依据《莱索托标准、质量保证、认可与计量法》设立，负责莱索托标准制定、推广和合格评定。对于锂离子BESS，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是固定式储能应用中电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。对IEC 62619的LSI合格评定——无论通过强制认证还是项目级合格评定文件——是莱索托BESS电池安全的预期技术基准。IEC 62933-5-1（电化学储能系统安全考量）规定系统级安全要求。IEC 63056（固定式储能系统用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）为固定式BESS应用提供额外的电芯级安全标准。截至本数据集日期，未从可公开获取的官方来源确认LSI管理的BESS电芯和模组具体强制认证方案；出口商在出货前应直接向LSI核实现行受监管产品范围及任何适用的强制合格标志要求。
summary.zht: LSI（賴索托標準機構）是賴索托的國家標準機構，依據《賴索托標準、質量保證、認可與計量法》設立，負責賴索托標準制定、推廣和合格評定。對於鋰離子BESS，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是固定式儲能應用中電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。對IEC 62619的LSI合格評定——無論通過強制認證還是項目級合格評定文件——是賴索托BESS電池安全的預期技術基準。IEC 62933-5-1（電化學儲能系統安全考量）規定系統級安全要求。IEC 63056（固定式儲能系統用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）為固定式BESS應用提供額外的電芯級安全標準。截至本數據集日期，未從可公開獲取的官方來源確認LSI管理的BESS電芯和模組具體強制認證方案；出口商在出貨前應直接向LSI核實現行受監管產品範圍及任何適用的強制合格標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety; LSI conformity required)
IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard)

IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems
LSI — Lesotho Standards Institution (national standards and conformity assessment body; verify current mandatory product certification scope directly with LSI)

summary.en: China's mandatory standard for lithium BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements). For electric vehicle batteries, GB 38031 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements for Traction Battery) is a separate mandatory standard and is not applicable to stationary BESS. The voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in stationary EES. GB/T 34131-2017 (Battery Management Systems for Electrical Energy Storage) covers BMS requirements. These Chinese national standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 conformity evidence in Lesotho LSI requirements or project technical specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance documentation.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国锂BESS电芯的强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求）。GB 38031（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）是电动汽车电池的独立强制性标准，不适用于固定式BESS。自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为固定式EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB/T 34131-2017（电化学储能系统电池管理系统技术规范）涵盖BMS要求。上述中国国家标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为莱索托LSI要求或项目技术规格中IEC 62619合格评定证据的替代依据。出口商除中国GB合规文件外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國鋰BESS電芯的強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求）。GB 38031（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）是電動汽車電池的獨立強制性標準，不適用於固定式BESS。自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為固定式EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB/T 34131-2017（電化學儲能系統電池管理系統技術規範）涵蓋BMS要求。上述中國國家標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為賴索托LSI要求或項目技術規格中IEC 62619合格評定證據的替代依據。出口商除中國GB合規文件外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements for Traction Battery; mandatory — EV application only, not applicable to stationary BESS)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能系统用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Battery Management Systems for Electrical Energy Storage — Technical Specification)

gap.en: Critical gap: IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Lesotho project specifications and LSI conformity requirements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes. GB 38031 is an EV traction battery standard and is irrelevant to stationary BESS. Exporters should: (a) verify the current LSI mandatory product certification scope for BESS cells and modules and any required LSI conformity mark directly with LSI before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619:2022 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for all cells and modules supplied to Lesotho BESS projects; (c) confirm whether IEC 63056 evidence is additionally required by the project owner or LEWA; (d) ensure BMS compliance documentation aligns with the IEC 62619 required battery management function scope in addition to GB/T 34131.
gap.zh: 关键差距：IEC 62619是莱索托项目规格和LSI合格评定要求中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被接受为替代依据。GB 38031是电动汽车牵引电池标准，与固定式BESS无关。出口商应：（a）在出货前直接向LSI核实BESS电芯和模组的现行LSI强制产品认证范围及任何所需LSI合格标志；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至莱索托BESS项目的所有电芯和模组的IEC 62619:2022型式试验证书；（c）确认项目业主或LEWA是否额外要求IEC 63056证据；（d）确保BMS合规文件除GB/T 34131外，还符合IEC 62619要求的电池管理功能范围。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：IEC 62619是賴索托項目規格和LSI合格評定要求中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被接受為替代依據。GB 38031是電動汽車牽引電池標準，與固定式BESS無關。出口商應：（a）在出貨前直接向LSI核實BESS電芯和模組的現行LSI強制產品認證範圍及任何所需LSI合格標誌；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至賴索托BESS項目的所有電芯和模組的IEC 62619:2022型式試驗證書；（c）確認項目業主或LEWA是否額外要求IEC 63056證據；（d）確保BMS合規文件除GB/T 34131外，還符合IEC 62619要求的電池管理功能範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where LSI conformity or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; specific mandatory LSI product certification scheme for BESS had not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with LSI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard for lithium BESS cells, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; GB 38031 is mandatory for EV traction batteries only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619 is the internationally expected safety baseline for lithium BESS cells and modules in Lesotho. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB 38031, and GB/T 36276-2023 certificates are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 conformity evidence in Lesotho project or LSI requirements. Obtain IEC 62619 type-test certification from an ILAC-accredited laboratory. Verify the current LSI mandatory certification scope for BESS directly with LSI before shipment to confirm whether a formal LSI conformity mark is required in addition to IEC 62619 type-test evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619是莱索托锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全基准。中国GB 44240-2024、GB 38031和GB/T 36276-2023证书不被接受为莱索托项目或LSI要求中IEC 62619合格评定证据的替代依据。须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验认证。出货前直接向LSI核实BESS的现行LSI强制认证范围，确认除IEC 62619型式试验证据外是否还需要正式的LSI合格标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619是賴索托鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全基準。中國GB 44240-2024、GB 38031和GB/T 36276-2023證書不被接受為賴索托項目或LSI要求中IEC 62619合格評定證據的替代依據。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗認證。出貨前直接向LSI核實BESS的現行LSI強制認證範圍，確認除IEC 62619型式試驗證據外是否還需要正式的LSI合格標誌。
